criteriaReview.criterion: Bass band influences at least one large-scale motion property
criteriaReview.evidence: bassToMacro() in mappings.ts (line 178) with pow(n, 0.7) curve confirmed. particleField.ts (line 56) applies bassBoost = 1 + bassEnergy * 2.

criteriaReview.criterion: Response is smoothed to avoid jitter
criteriaReview.evidence: EMA smoothing in renderLoop.ts (line 107): smoothBass = smoothBass * 0.88 + rawBass * 0.12. Test T-018-02 validates jitter reduction.

criteriaReview.criterion: Effect remains visible when audio is unmuted or muted
criteriaReview.evidence: Synthetic fallback in renderLoop.ts (lines 102-104): when rawBass < 5, generates 30 + 25 * sin(elapsed * 0.001). Test T-018-03 covers this.

criteriaReview.criterion: No clipping or visual instability occurs
criteriaReview.evidence: Toroidal wrapping in particleField.ts (lines 86-94). bassToMacro clamps to 0-1. Test T-018-04 verifies bounds at max bass.

recommendation: Ship. All acceptance criteria satisfied, tests pass, no discrepancies between plan and implementation.
decision: All claims verified against codebase. Implementation is complete and correct.
